title: Plutarch, Moralia: Bravery of Women
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Bravery of Women.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Bravery of Women.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Bravery of Women': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
